setup.audio_step2: 2. Click '+' at the bottom left → 'Create Multi-Output Device'
setup.audio_step3:
3. A new item appears on the left — click on it.
   On the right, a table appears. Under the 'Use' column, check:
   ☑ MacBook Pro Speakers (or your headphones)
   ☑ BlackHole 2ch
setup.audio_step4: 4. Rename to 'Meeting Output' (optional, double-click the name)
setup.audio_step5:
5. Go to System Settings → Sound → Output
   → Select 'Meeting Output'
   (you will still hear everything normally)
setup.audio_step6:
6. In Google Meet → ⚙️ Settings → Audio
   → Speaker: leave as 'System default'
   (BlackHole will receive the audio automatically)
setup.how_to_use:
./run.sh

  Press ENTER to start recording.
  Press Ctrl+C to stop and save.
  The .md file is saved to ~/Documents/Meetings/
setup.folder_structure_options:
1) One folder per meeting (default): Meetings/20260326_1400_name/
  2) Grouped by day: Meetings/20260326/1400_name/

run.setup_required: Setup not complete. Please run ./setup.sh first.
run.meeting_lang_options:
1) English (default)
  2) Portuguese
  3) Spanish
  4) French
  5) German
  6) Italian
  7) Japanese
  8) Chinese
  9) Dutch
run.meeting_name_prompt: Meeting name (optional, press Enter to skip):
